'''Red 10''' was a [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighter]] in service to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It was assigned to [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]]<ref name="CCG-Red10" /> and stationed at the [[Great Temple/Legends|Rebel base]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]].<ref name="CCG-R2X2" /> Red 10 was [[Pilot/Legends|piloted]] by [[Theron Nett/Legends|Theron Nett]]<ref name="CCG-Red10" /> with [[R2-X2/Legends|R2-X2]] as the craft's [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]].<ref name="CCG-R2X2" /> 

During the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Red 10 was destroyed by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] while covering [[Garven Dreis/Legends|Garven Dreis]] as he attempted to launch [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedoes]] into the [[Thermal exhaust port/Legends|thermal exhaust port]] of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]].<ref name="ANH" />
